---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to ...
2. Click on ...
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Environment

| Field            | Value                      |
| ---------------- | -------------------------- |
| OS               | e.g. macOS 14.4            |
| CodeBench version | e.g. 1.0.0                 |
| Flutter version  | `flutter --version` output |

## Additional context

Any other relevant information.
